description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on repository dispatches of type on-demand-build and on release events. Run a build job on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, windows-latest, and macos-latest environments. For each job, check out the repository, set up Node.js 13.x, install dependencies with npm install, and then conditionally change the version if the tag contains '0.0.0-latest-master'. Finally, prebuild a binary with npm run prebuild:build and create a GitHub release with the prebuilt tar.gz files.
